title: Prevention of Lassa fever - Canada.ca
content:
## Prevention of Lassa fever
Learn how  Lassa fever can be prevented.

## How Lassa fever can be prevented
There’s no vaccine for Lassa fever.
If you’re  travelling in West Africa, you can prevent the spread of Lassa fever by avoiding  close contact with:
- infected  individuals and their bodily fluids, including:
